title: valeriana interrupta var. elatior
intro: Valeriana interrupta var. elatior, also known as tall valerian, is a variety of the valerian plant, a perennial flowering plant native to Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include sedative, anxiolytic, and antispasmodic effects, making it a popular herbal remedy for promoting relaxation and reducing stress. The health benefits of valeriana interrupta var. elatior include improved sleep quality, reduced anxiety and restlessness, and relief from muscle cramps and spasms. Valeriana interrupta var. elatior is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
